props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names for the container.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the container element.

props.name: trailLength
props.description: Number of points stored for the cursor trail (longer = longer smear).

props.name: inertia
props.description: Velocity retention when the pointer stops. Higher values make the cursor glide longer.

props.name: grainIntensity
props.description: Strength of the film grain post-processing pass.

props.name: bloomRadius
props.description: UnrealBloom radius controlling spread of glow.

props.name: bloomThreshold
props.description: UnrealBloom threshold; lower includes more pixels in bloom.

props.name: brightness
props.description: Final brightness multiplier applied to the effect color.

props.name: color
props.description: Base color of the ghost cursor effect.

props.name: mixBlendMode
props.description: Blend mode used when compositing with page content.

props.name: edgeIntensity
props.description: Darkening near edges of the canvas. 0 = none, 1 = strongest.

props.name: maxDevicePixelRatio
props.description: Upper cap for devicePixelRatio to control render cost on high-DPR displays.

props.name: targetPixels
props.description: Pixel budget. Resolution is dynamically scaled to keep total pixel count under this budget.

props.name: fadeDelayMs
props.description: Idle delay before the trail starts to fade after pointer leaves/stops.

props.name: fadeDurationMs
props.description: Duration of the trail fade-out once the delay has elapsed.

props.name: zIndex
props.description: z-index applied to the canvas for layering above/below content.
